_meta.keyKnowledge: We explore how visual conventions and materials communicate meaning across cultures, times and places, including Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander art.

_source.w: We explore how visual conventions and materials communicate meaning across cultures, times and places, including Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander art.
y: Understanding art from diverse contexts helps us see how visual language carries cultural meaning.
Analysing artworks builds our critical thinking and visual literacy.
Engaging with art from different traditions inspires our own creative development.
eg: We ask 'What does this artwork tell us about the impact of this person or culture on society?'.
We compare visual arts practices from different periods and places.
We investigate how contemporary artists respond to social and environmental issues.
We analyse how art movements have influenced each other across cultures.
We explore how technology has changed art-making practices over time.
We discuss how artworks can challenge, inspire or document human experience.
